vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.description: A front-line warrior who converts defense into offense and thrives in heavy gear.

arcanist.name: Arcanist
arcanist.description: A spellcaster who overwhelms foes with chained spells, draw, and surging arcane bursts.

ancient_forge.name: Ancient Forge
ancient_forge.description: A still-warm furnace lies buried beneath broken brick.

silent_pool.name: Silent Pool
silent_pool.description: The water reflects an unnatural light.

fallen_pack.name: Lost Pack
fallen_pack.description: An abandoned pack by the roadside hangs half-open.

inked_vellum.name: Inked Vellum
inked_vellum.description: A scroll still warm to the touch, its letters rearranging under your gaze.

scribe_echo.label: Inscribe Echo Rune
scribe_echo.description: Choose an attack card. For this run, it draws 1 extra card when played.

flash_charge.label: Brand Flash Charge
flash_charge.description: Choose an upgradable card. In the next combat, it grants 1 extra energy when played.

ember_tablet.name: Ember Tablet
ember_tablet.description: Heat still seeps from the charred stone, as if it awaits a new bearer.

brand_cinders.label: Engrave Cinder Brand
brand_cinders.description: Choose an attack card. For this run, it applies 2 extra burn when it hits.

bulwark_blueprint.name: Bulwark Blueprint
bulwark_blueprint.description: The rigid lines of the blueprint seem to preach order and tempo.

trace_bastion.label: Trace the Bastion
trace_bastion.description: Choose a skill card. For this run, it grants 4 extra block when played.

opening_spark.label: Copy the Opening Form
opening_spark.description: Choose an upgradable card. In the first turn of the next combat, it draws 1 extra card when played.

arcane_echo.name: Arcane Echo
arcane_echo.description: Twisted spell resonance still lingers in the air.

scarred_altar.name: Scarred Altar
scarred_altar.description: Ancient lettering across the altar speaks only of cost.

blood_for_power.label: Offer Blood
blood_for_power.description: Lose 10 HP and gain Ember Totem.

field_workbench.name: Field Workbench
field_workbench.description: Scattered tools and half-finished gear still hold a trace of heat.

glass_sanctum.name: Glass Sanctum
glass_sanctum.description: A fragment of light still flickers inside the paper-thin crystal shell.

touch_core.label: Touch the Core
touch_core.description: Lose 12 HP and gain Focus Prism.

blood_coffer.name: Blood-Sealed Coffer
blood_coffer.description: The seal across the coffer pulses like a living vein.

relic_annealer.name: Relic Annealer
relic_annealer.description: An ancient device hums softly, as if it could wake sleeping relics once more.

awaken_banner.label: Rekindle the Banner
awaken_banner.description: Upgrade War Banner into Awakened War Banner.

awaken_hourglass.label: Reforge the Hourglass
awaken_hourglass.description: Upgrade Crystal Hourglass into Awakened Crystal Hourglass.

awaken_ember.label: Feed the Ember
awaken_ember.description: Upgrade Ember Totem into Ember Totem Awakened.

awaken_core.label: Resonate the Core
awaken_core.description: Upgrade Spell Core into Spell Core Awakened.

war_council.name: War Council
war_council.description: Survivors still arguing over tactics beckon you to the table.

relay_cache.name: Relay Cache
relay_cache.description: The markings inside the crate only make sense to a coordinated squad.
